{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Partners received this special gift after Traveler Duck Bro left this dimension. They will be reminded of that glamorous time when they fought together whenever they put it on.
|affct=FTH
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=2666
|relic1=Divine Comedy
|relic2=Aladdin Lamp
|relic3=Prometheus Torch
|relic4=Voyager 1
|relic5=The Thinker
}}
|color=orange
|earth=11
|water=10
|fire=10
|wind=11
|form=Angel
|element=Wind
|realm=Cathay
|orangehard=HP
}}
